examples: I wanted to eat my words when I found out that she had painted the picture I criticized so caustically.
Told that Capello had said his players are unable to cope with the "pressure of the World Cup", David James paused and said caustically: "Did he?"
The first Cynics were a group of ancient Greek philosophers, most notably Diogenes, who caustically denounced the established culture of their time.
In his writing, he combined a caustically cruel eye with overflowing sentiment, often directed at the young men friends he fell in love with.
Veep stars Julia Louie Dreyfus as the caustically narcissistic Vice President Selina Myer and Girls is led on- and off-camera by phenom Lena Dunham.
